nodes.title: 1. Load model with Transformers
widgets_values:
import gc
import torch
from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer

MODEL_NAME = "Qwen/Qwen3-14B"

if 'model' in globals():
    del model
if 'tokenizer' in globals():
    del tokenizer

gc.collect()
if torch.cuda.is_available():
    torch.cuda.empty_cache()
    torch.cuda.ipc_collect()

print(f"Loading tokenizer: {MODEL_NAME}")
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(MODEL_NAME)

print(f"Loading model: {MODEL_NAME}")
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(
    MODEL_NAME,
    torch_dtype=torch.float16 if torch.cuda.is_available() else torch.float32,
    device_map="auto"
)
model.eval()

print(f"Model class: {model.__class__.__name__}")
print(f"Layers: {len(model.model.layers)}")
print(f"Hidden size: {model.config.hidden_size}")

Result = {
    "model": model,
    "tokenizer": tokenizer,
    "model_name": MODEL_NAME
}

​Loading tokenizer: Qwen/Qwen3-14B
Loading model: Qwen/Qwen3-14B
Model class: Qwen3ForCausalLM
Layers: 40
Hidden size: 5120

nodes.title: 2. Run prompt and capture activations
widgets_values:
bundle = input
model = bundle["model"]
tokenizer = bundle["tokenizer"]

prompt = "That error means the working directory didn’t actually end up as /workspace/ComfyUI when Python ran (so it looked for main.py in /workspace). Easiest fix: cd inside the bash -lc command and don’t rely on docker exec -w (it should work, but this avoids any surprises)."
layer_idx = 39

messages = [
    {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
]

text = tokenizer.apply_chat_template(
    messages,
    tokenize=False,
    add_generation_prompt=True
)

inputs = tokenizer(text, return_tensors="pt")
model_device = next(model.parameters()).device
inputs = {k: v.to(model_device) for k, v in inputs.items()}

activations = {}

def hook_fn(module, module_inputs, module_output):
    out = module_output
    if isinstance(out, tuple):
        out = out[0]
    activations["layer_output"] = out.detach().float().cpu()

num_layers = len(model.model.layers)
if layer_idx < 0 or layer_idx >= num_layers:
    raise ValueError(f"layer_idx {layer_idx} out of range for model with {num_layers} layers")

target_module = model.model.layers[layer_idx]
handle = target_module.register_forward_hook(hook_fn)

with torch.no_grad():
    outputs = model(**inputs)

handle.remove()

if "layer_output" not in activations:
    raise RuntimeError("Hook did not capture any activations")

resid = activations["layer_output"]
input_ids_cpu = inputs["input_ids"].detach().cpu()
tokens = tokenizer.convert_ids_to_tokens(input_ids_cpu[0])

print(f"Captured layer output from layer {layer_idx}")
print(f"Activation shape: {tuple(resid.shape)}")
print(f"Token count: {input_ids_cpu.shape[1]}")

Result = {
    "model_name": bundle["model_name"],
    "prompt": prompt,
    "text": text,
    "layer_idx": layer_idx,
    "activations": resid,
    "input_ids": input_ids_cpu,
    "tokens": tokens,
    "shape": tuple(resid.shape)
}

​Captured layer output from layer 39
Activation shape: (1, 72, 5120)
Token count: 72

nodes.title: 3. Plot activation heatmap
widgets_values:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

payload = input
resid = payload["activations"]
layer_idx = payload["layer_idx"]
tokens = payload["tokens"]

# Expect [batch, seq, hidden]
if resid.ndim != 3:
    raise ValueError(f"Expected 3D activation tensor, got shape {tuple(resid.shape)}")

heatmap = resid[0].T
num_tokens = heatmap.shape[1]
hidden_size = heatmap.shape[0]

mean = float(heatmap.mean())
std = float(heatmap.std())

# symmetric range around zero, clipped to 3 standard deviations
absmax = 3.0 * std

# fallback in the degenerate case
if absmax == 0 or not (absmax > 0):
    absmax = 1.0

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(20, 12))
fig.patch.set_facecolor("white")
ax.set_facecolor("#f7f7fb")

im = ax.imshow(
    heatmap,
    cmap="RdBu_r",
    aspect="auto",
    interpolation="nearest",
    vmin=-absmax,
    vmax=absmax
)

ax.set_title(
    f"Transformers Activation Heatmap • Layer {layer_idx}",
    fontsize=18,
    pad=14,
    weight="bold"
)
ax.set_xlabel("Token position", fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel("Hidden dimension", fontsize=12)

if num_tokens <= 80:
    step = 1
else:
    step = max(1, num_tokens // 40)

xticks = list(range(0, num_tokens, step))
xticklabels = []
for i in xticks:
    tok = tokens[i]
    tok = tok.replace("Ġ", " ").replace("▁", " ")
    if len(tok) > 12:
        tok = tok[:12] + "…"
    xticklabels.append(tok)

ax.set_xticks(xticks)
ax.set_xticklabels(xticklabels, rotation=60, ha="right", fontsize=8)

cbar = plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, pad=0.015)
cbar.set_label("Activation value", rotation=90)

summary_text = (
    f"shape={tuple(resid.shape)}\n"
    f"tokens={num_tokens}\n"
    f"hidden={hidden_size}"
)
ax.text(
    1.01,
    0.02,
    summary_text,
    transform=ax.transAxes,
    fontsize=10,
    va="bottom",
    bbox=dict(boxstyle="round,pad=0.4", facecolor="white", alpha=0.9)
)

plt.tight_layout()

print(f"Visualized layer {layer_idx}")
print(f"Heatmap shape: {tuple(heatmap.shape)}")

Result = {
    "status": "ok",
    "layer_idx": layer_idx,
    "heatmap_shape": tuple(heatmap.shape)
}
